heading: Service of process
label: 22108 Service of process
text: The corporation shall have a designated agent in the District of Columbia to receive service of process for the corporation. Notice to or service on the agent, or mailed to the business address of the agent, is notice to or service on the corporation.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2210836:346 (last sentence).(last sentence), .Sept. 20, 1950, ch. 958, § 664 Stat. 871The words “at all times” are omitted as unnecessary. The words “to receive” are substituted for “authorized to accept”, and the words “is notice” are substituted for “shall be deemed notice”, for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate unnecessary words.
